grid_dims_observed.note: x_chain's inner span [5.00, 3.50] sums to 8.50 = master grid's 1(0.0)-to-3(8.5); the leading/trailing 0.60 segments are eave overhangs outside the 1-3 structural span, same convention as house #3's equivalent electrical sheet. y_chain reads [2.70, 2.30, 3.50, 1.50] = E-D, D-C, C-B, B-A giving E(0.0)/D(2.70)/C(5.00)/B(8.50)/A(10.00), matching the master grid exactly; the leading 2.00 above E is a roof/eave dimension outside the E-A structural span, not a grid line. The master's dummy row E' (-1.90, from the structural foundation pages) is not depicted on this architecture/electrical sheet -- it falls outside the building envelope shown here (likely an isolated exterior footing row), consistent with it not appearing on floor-plan-scoped sheets.

elements.description: Downlight(s) labeled 'i' in เก็บของ (storage) -- one mark near the top of the room, a second mark lower near the ครัว boundary with what appears to be an adjacent switch dot
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'e' in ครัว, one near the top wall shared with ซักล้าง, one lower near the stair/landing boundary
Symbol labeled 'f' at the top wall boundary between ซักล้าง and ครัว, near a door opening
elements.room: ซักล้าง/ครัว boundary

elements.description: Symbol(s) labeled 'g' near the ครัว/staircase boundary, next to a 'ลง' (down) arrow marking a half-level stair down toward the kitchen/back area; appears twice (once near 'e', once lower near the ห้องน้ำ 1/staircase landing)
Symbol labeled 'h' near ห้องน้ำ 1, drawn with a circled icon distinct from the standard ⊕ downlight glyph -- possibly a ceiling fixture or exhaust point over the bathroom

Downlights (⊕) labeled 'd', four marks total: two near the top wall shared with ซักล้าง/เก็บของ, one near the ครัว/ทานอาหาร partition beside a small built-in unit symbol, and one near the ทานอาหาร/โถง boundary
elements.room: ทานอาหาร / โถง boundary

elements.description: Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'c' in โถง (hall), with a '1/LP' circuit tag printed immediately to the left of the first mark -- marking this as the feed point from panel LP circuit 1
A boxed cluster labeled 'a,b,c' near the staircase 'ขึ้น' (up) arrow -- read as a multi-gang switch plate at the stair landing controlling circuits a (พักผ่อน), b (เฉลียง), and c (โถง)
Downlights (⊕) labeled 'a' in พักผ่อน (living/relax room), arranged roughly 2 near the staircase/door side, 2 mid-room, and 2 near the เฉลียง boundary
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'b' in เฉลียง (porch), near the bottom edge close to 'ม้านั่ง คสล.' (concrete bench)
Incoming service run at the bottom of the sheet: '2-2.5 NYY-25 mm.PVC' wire down to a weatherproof bell switch (SB, circled) near the entrance stairs ('ขึ้น')

warnings: GRID: this sheet's independently-read grid (named columns 1/2/3, named rows E/D/C/B/A, spacing 5.00+3.50 horizontal and 2.70+2.30+3.50+1.50 vertical) matches the master grid file (บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json) exactly, cross-validating both extractions. The master's E' dummy row (structural, -1.90m) is outside this sheet's building-envelope crop and is not expected to appear here.

Single-letter room-fixture labels (i, e, f, g, h, d, c, a, b) are legible as symbols but the fine switch-loop wiring/label text is genuinely hard to resolve at the available image resolution -- several elements above are flagged needs_human_review_zoom_required rather than asserted with full confidence, following the same honesty standard used in house #3's equivalent EE-03 extraction (page 58 there).
This is a 2-story house so this sheet only covers the ground floor; the corresponding upper-floor lighting plan is EE-04 (page 62, separate file).
No fixture symbol was confidently identified inside จอดรถ (carport) on this crop -- possibly an unlit/unlabeled space, or a fixture too faint to resolve; flagged rather than invented.

A small boxed label '3 | +0.20 | 5' appears near ห้องน้ำ 1 -- reads as a floor-level/elevation marker (+0.20m) rather than an electrical symbol; left out of the electrical elements list as out-of-discipline annotation carried over from the architectural base drawing.

The ⊕ downlight count summed from this best-effort element list is approximately 2 (เก็บของ) + 2 (ครัว) + 4 (ทานอาหาร/โถง boundary) + 2 (โถง) + 6 (พักผ่อน) + 2 (เฉลียง) = 18, plus assorted switch/wall-fixture symbols (f, g, h) -- lower confidence than a fully zoomed re-read would give.
